Bash(sqlite3 /Users/astroid/Desktop/academics/university-of-warwick/computer-science/3rd-year-modules/cs310-computer-science-project/FINAL/gitrip-mvp/server/gitrip.db "SELECT substr\(c.snapshot, 1, 1000\) FROM commits c JOIN branches b ON b.head_commit_id = c.id WHERE b.repo_id = ''fb69edd9-a472-4397-9e6a-e494920df678'' AND b.name = ''main'';")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/astroid/Desktop/academics/university-of-warwick/computer-science/3rd-year-modules/cs310-computer-science-project/FINAL/gitrip-mvp/server/gitrip.db "SELECT r.title, b.name, substr\(c.snapshot, 1, 500\) FROM commits c JOIN branches b ON b.head_commit_id = c.id JOIN repos r ON b.repo_id = r.id WHERE c.snapshot NOT LIKE ''%""days"":[]%'' LIMIT 5;")
